name: VoidLink C2 Beaconing Profile
description: Detection profile for VoidLink's adaptive C2 beaconing patterns. VoidLink uses risk-score-driven timing with two profiles: aggressive (no EDR) and paranoid (EDR detected). Aegis should match on inter-arrival time regularity and HTTP pattern characteristics.

aggressive.description: VoidLink beaconing when no EDR/security products detected
aggressive.notes: High regularity — low jitter makes cadence detection easier

paranoid.description: VoidLink beaconing when EDR products detected (evasion mode)
paranoid.notes: Higher jitter to evade cadence analysis — wider IAT distribution

http_camouflage_modes.indicator: Periodic PNG downloads with consistent sizes from single endpoint
http_camouflage_modes.detection: Check if PNG IDAT chunk size varies unnaturally or contains non-image entropy

http_camouflage_modes.indicator: JS file downloads at regular intervals not triggered by page loads
http_camouflage_modes.detection: JavaScript responses with base64-encoded data in variable assignments

http_camouflage_modes.indicator: CSS file requests with no associated HTML page load
http_camouflage_modes.detection: CSS responses containing base64 data in comments

http_camouflage_modes.indicator: JSON API calls with regular cadence and consistent payload sizes
http_camouflage_modes.detection: Regular API polling with encrypted/encoded data field

user_agents: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64; rv:109.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/121.0
transport_signatures.note: User-Agent rotation itself is a signal — legitimate clients don't change UA per request

iat_analysis.description: Analyze inter-arrival times of outbound HTTP requests to same destination
iat_analysis.method: Calculate coefficient of variation (CV) of IAT series. Low CV (<0.3) with base interval matching profiles indicates beaconing.

ua_rotation.description: Detect User-Agent string rotation from single source IP
ua_rotation.method: Track UA strings per source IP. Flag if >3 distinct UAs seen within 5-minute window.

content_type_mismatch.description: Detect HTTP responses where Content-Type doesn't match actual content
content_type_mismatch.method: Entropy analysis of response bodies. PNG/JS/CSS with high entropy (>7.0) suggests encrypted C2 payload.

session_fingerprinting.description: Correlate handshake → heartbeat → sync request chain
session_fingerprinting.method: Flag sessions that follow exact VoidLink endpoint sequence within short timeframe.
